\begin{table}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Shared-flow verification-method ablation. Each row replaces the verifier while the conformal calibration $(\mathrm{flow}, q)$ is held fixed per instance, isolating verification quality from calibration noise. \emph{Recall} $\uparrow$ is the fraction of effective-UNSAT instances correctly certified UNSAT (with the breakdown shown). \emph{Sound viol.} $\downarrow$ counts UNSAT verdicts on GT-SAT instances (lower is safer). Bold per-column highlights the best value; the bolded method name marks the production default. ACAS Xu has 140 effective-UNSAT and 47 GT-SAT instances; tllverify has 15 and 17 respectively. AMLS-bounded is the only method on the Pareto front (best-or-tied on every column).}
\label{tab:shared_flow_ablation}
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
